_note: ABRAHAM'S EXTENDED HOUSEHOLD & CONTEMPORARIES (~2000-1900 BC) — the people around Abraham that the main biblical sweep skipped. All from Genesis unless flagged. (1) KETURAH, Abraham's wife after Sarah (called a concubine in 1 Chron 1:32), and her line: her six sons Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, Shuah (Gen 25:1-2); Jokshan's sons Sheba & Dedan and Dedan's sons Asshurim, Letushim, Leummim (Gen 25:3); Midian's sons Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, Eldaah (Gen 25:4). Midian did NOT already exist (KEDOM_HADAD is Hadad of Edom who DEFEATED Midian, Gen 36:35), so Midian is created here. (2) NAHOR (Abraham's brother, existing NAHORBRO) & MILCAH's eight sons (Gen 22:20-24): Uz, Buz, Kemuel (father of Aram), Chesed, Hazo, Pildash, Jidlaph, and Bethuel (EXISTS — referenced, appended to the existing NAHORBRO+MILCAH union); plus Nahor's concubine Reumah and her four sons Tebah, Gaham, Tahash, Maacah (kind:concubine, mistress=MILCAH). (3) Contemporaries with no genealogy in scripture, each rendered as its own unplaced island under blank parents, flag on the card: Melchizedek king & priest of Salem (Gen 14:18; 'without genealogy', Heb 7:3), Abimelech king of Gerar (Gen 20-21), Eliezer of Damascus the steward & heir-presumptive (Gen 15:2). (4) The four eastern kings of Genesis 14:1 as a small flagged biblical group under one blank pair — Chedorlaomer of Elam, Amraphel of Shinar, Arioch of Ellasar, Tidal of Goiim; NOT tied to attested rulers here because the identifications (Amraphel=Hammurabi, Tidal=a Tudhaliya, etc.) are all disputed and unconfirmed. NOTE on Sarah: the tradition identifying Sarah with Iscah daughter of Haran (Josephus, Antiquities 1.6.5; b. Sanhedrin 69b) is NOT applied — ISCAH is kept as a distinct person, and Sarah's own scriptural identity as Terah's daughter/Abraham's half-sister (Gen 20:12) is already carried in 07c_kin (TERAHW2). Grandson ids namespaced (SHEBA_KET, DEDAN_KET, HANOCH_MID, ARAM_NAHOR) to avoid collision with the same names elsewhere in scripture (e.g. Sheba/Dedan sons of Raamah in Gen 10:7, Aram son of Shem). Sorts after 07-series so ABRAHAM, NAHORBRO, MILCAH, BETHUEL all exist first; new parents are defined before they are reused.
